message:
fix(mux): fix VIEW_ACTION protocol mismatch, add clipboard paste, and improve shortcut fonts

- Fix sendViewAction encoding action_len as u16 instead of u8, causing
  all menu/palette actions to arrive with a leading null byte (broken)
- Fix Edit menu action strings to match Ghostty binding names
  (copy_to_clipboard, paste_from_clipboard, paste_from_selection, select_all)
- Add SET_CLIPBOARD (0x8C) control message so browser clipboard can be
  sent to server before paste, enabling proper bracketed paste support
- Update readClipboardCallback to return stored standard clipboard
- Use Inter/Source Code Pro/Roboto/Verdana font stack for shortcut display

files.patch:
@@ -33,6 +33,7 @@ export const BinaryCtrlMsg = {
   SET_OVERVIEW: 0x89,  // Set overview open/closed state
   SET_QUICK_TERMINAL: 0x8A,  // Set quick terminal open/closed state
   SET_INSPECTOR: 0x8B,  // Set inspector open/closed state
+  SET_CLIPBOARD: 0x8C,  // Send clipboard text to server: [panel_id:u32][len:u32][text...]
   // Auth messages
   GET_AUTH_STATE: 0x90,
   SET_PASSWORD: 0x91,
